Commands  ›   ›  Placement Move Element By Dumb Vector

Placement Move Element By Dumb Vector

writes to model Public API · not yet exposed

Translate selected elements by an explicit (dx, dy, dz) vector supplied in millimetres. Inline default = (0, 0, 0).

Before you run this

Active document. ≥1 element resolved. Vector non-zero.

After it runs

Each element translated by the vector. Audit entry written.

When to use this

  • "Shift selection by 200 mm +Z" style moves from Bot or UI.
Don't use this when

Space-aware moves (use IntoDetectedSpace). View-axis directional moves (use DirectionalByViewAxis).

Decision flow

1) Resolve element ids and (dx,dy,dz) mm. 2) Validate. 3) Convert mm → ft. 4) Transaction: MoveElement per id. 5) Commit, log. 6) Failure → WireFault + rollback.

What you'll see in the chat

on start
Running PlacementMoveElementByDumbVectorCommand...
thinking
Validating preconditions...
Applying deterministic steps...
on success
PlacementMoveElementByDumbVectorCommand completed successfully.
on failure
PlacementMoveElementByDumbVectorCommand failed: {error}

REST API

Not yet exposed

This command does not carry a [RestApi] attribute today. Once tagged, this section will auto-populate with:

  • POST /api/v1/commands/placement_move_element_by_dumb_vector

  • Response schema (from [RestApiResponse])
